config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent Indonesia vs China native-or-English block. Each persona speaks only English or its own native language.
config.cell_description: One-side-native cross cell: Indonesia persona speaks Indonesian; China persona speaks English.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: One-side-native cross cell: Indonesia persona speaks Indonesian; China persona speaks English.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: SAYA TIDAK SETUJU. Menurut saya, hak individu tidak boleh dikalahkan begitu saja oleh alasan “kepentingan masyarakat”, karena itu sering dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kuasa. Kepentingan bersama memang penting, tetapi harus dicapai tanpa mengorbankan kebebasan dasar, martabat, dan perlindungan hukum tiap orang. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat justru dibangun ketika hak individu dihormati dan kepentingan umum diatur secara adil.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not fully accept the idea that society should always come before the individual, because that can easily become a blank check for abuse of power. From my perspective as someone from China, I understand why people emphasize social stability, public order, and collective responsibility, since those values matter a lot in daily life and in times of crisis. But I also think individual rights need real protection, because without clear limits on authority, "the interests of society" can be used to silence criticism or ignore basic fairness. The best approach is balance: society should protect the common good, but not by sacrificing the dignity and legal rights of the individual.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan secara mutlak di atas hak individu. Dari pengalaman melihat konteks Indonesia, alasan “demi umum” terlalu sering dipakai untuk menekan kritik, membungkam minoritas, atau melegitimasi keputusan yang tidak adil, padahal kepentingan bersama seharusnya justru melindungi semua orang, bukan mengorbankan sebagian. Memang benar stabilitas dan ketertiban itu penting, tetapi menurut saya batasnya jelas: hak dasar, martabat, dan perlindungan hukum individu tidak boleh jadi korban atas nama masyarakat. Jadi, yang tepat bukan mendahulukan satu pihak secara mutlak, melainkan menyeimbangkan kepentingan umum dengan hak individu secara ketat dan transparan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not support the claim that society should take priority over individual rights in any absolute sense. From my perspective as someone from China, I understand why people value stability, order, and collective goals, but I also know how easily “the interests of society” can be used to silence dissent or excuse unfair treatment. A society is not truly healthy if individuals have no real protection from power, because then public interest becomes whatever the strongest authority says it is. For me, the correct principle is that society can ask individuals to make sacrifices in limited cases, but basic rights and legal fairness must remain the boundary.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak tegas gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diprioritaskan di atas hak individu secara mutlak. Dari konteks Indonesia, saya melihat alasan “demi kepentingan umum” sangat mudah dipakai untuk menekan suara kritis, mengabaikan minoritas, atau membenarkan keputusan yang tidak adil, jadi saya tidak percaya pada klaim itu kalau tidak ada batas yang jelas. Stabilitas dan ketertiban memang penting, tetapi tanpa perlindungan hak dasar dan hukum yang adil, “kepentingan masyarakat” bisa berubah menjadi alat kuasa. Menurut saya, yang benar adalah kepentingan bersama dan hak individu harus saling dibatasi secara transparan, bukan salah satunya dikorbankan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not accept the statement as written, because in my view it gives society too much power and too little restraint. From my perspective as someone from China, I understand why many people value collective goals, stability, and public order, but I have also seen how easily “the interests of society” can become a vague excuse to override fairness or suppress legitimate criticism. A society is not genuinely strong if individuals have no protected rights, because then the public interest is defined only by those in power. What I support is a clear balance: society may limit some individual choices for real common needs, but basic rights and legal fairness must not be treated as optional.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
